name: g-cloud
title: Google Cloud CLI
subtitle: Manage your Google Cloud resources without opening a browser
description: A lightweight Raycast extension for managing Google Cloud resources efficiently. Access and control your GCP projects, services, IAM, storage, and more—all without leaving Raycast.
author: ojowwalker77

commands.name: index
commands.title: Google Cloud
commands.subtitle: Unified Google Cloud Management
commands.description: Unified Google Cloud management - access Compute, Storage, IAM, Network, and Secrets from one place

commands.name: configurations
commands.title: Settings & Configuration
commands.subtitle: Manage gcloud configs & extension settings
commands.description: List, switch, create, duplicate, and delete named gcloud configurations. Manage extension settings.

preferences.name: gcloudPath
preferences.title: gcloud CLI Path
preferences.description: Leave empty to auto-detect, or specify custom path to gcloud executable

preferences.name: defaultRegion
preferences.title: Default Region
preferences.description: Default GCP region for new resources (e.g., us-central1, europe-west1)

preferences.name: preferredIDE
preferences.title: Default IDE
preferences.description: IDE for opening files (e.g., logs, configs)
